<!-- Generated by scripts/build-codex-plugin.ts; do not edit. -->

## Codex routing

Prefer `loa_show` for a known entry and `memory_recall` to browse recent entries. Use CLI-only quote/list variants when needed.

The canonical workflow below remains authoritative, but equivalent behavior is not assumed across hosts.

List, view, and search Library of Alexandria (LoA) entries. LoA entries are curated knowledge captures with Fabric-extracted insights, message lineage, and project context.

## Usage

```bash
# List recent entries
recall loa list

# Show full entry with Fabric extract
recall loa show <id>

# View raw source messages
recall loa quote <id>
```

**List options:**

- `-l <n>` — Max entries (default: 10)

## Examples

```bash
# Browse recent LoA entries
recall loa list

# Show last 20 entries
recall loa list -l 20

# View full Fabric-extracted wisdom for entry #5
recall loa show 5

# See the raw conversation messages behind entry #12
recall loa quote 12
```
